log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Werewolf --- HP: 58/58 | AC: 11
REASONING: Moving toward Merfolk — Bardic Musician (40ft away). Dashing.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Merfolk — Bardic Musician.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Merfolk — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 4 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:7+0=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:18+0=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:9+0=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Werewolf: WIS save [d20:2+0=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/4 targets affected.
